title: HR Onboarding
description: Key design elements for new-hire onboarding pages, first-week checklists, employee guides, and HR welcome kits.

question_templates.question: 这是哪类公司或团队的新员工入职材料？
面向什么岗位或团队：工程、销售、运营、设计、通用员工？
覆盖多长时间：第一天、第一周、30 天，还是完整试用期？
新员工必须完成哪些任务：账号、培训、文档、会议、提交材料？

defaults.output_contract: standalone responsive HTML HR onboarding guide
defaults.primary_user: new hire learning how to become productive in a role
defaults.business_domain: human resources onboarding and employee enablement
defaults.decision_goal: show the new hire what to do, who to meet, and how success will be measured
defaults.visual_direction: welcoming but practical guide with timelines, checklists, people cards, and tool access steps
